title: Irrigation Cost Check
description: Industrial-grade tool to evaluate irrigation system cost efficiency, hidden losses, and actionable improvements based on ISO 14046, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC DC metrics.

inputs.label: Annual water volume used
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of water withdrawn for irrigation per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of water withdrawn for irrigation per year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sulama için yılda çekilen toplam su hacmi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte jährlich für Bewässerung entnommene Wassermenge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume total d'eau prélevé pour l'irrigation par an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen total de agua extraída para riego por año.

inputs.label: Water cost per m³
inputs.businessContext: Unit cost of water including extraction, treatment, and delivery.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit cost of water including extraction, treatment, and delivery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkarma, arıtma ve dağıtım dahil birim su maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stückkosten des Wassers inklusive Gewinnung, Aufbereitung und Lieferung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût unitaire de l'eau incluant l'extraction, le traitement et la livraison.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste unitario del agua, incluyendo extracción, tratamiento y distribución.

inputs.label: Energy cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Average electricity cost for pumping and distribution.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average electricity cost for pumping and distribution.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompalama ve dağıtım için ortalama elektrik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Stromkosten für Pumpen und Verteilung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen de l'électricité pour le pompage et la distribution.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste medio de electricidad para bombeo y distribución.

inputs.label: Pump system efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Overall efficiency of pump and motor system (ISO 9906).

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall efficiency of pump and motor system (ISO 9906).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompa ve motor sisteminin genel verimliliği (ISO 9906).
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia general del sistema de bomba y motor (ISO 9906).

inputs.label: Distribution losses
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of water lost due to leaks, evaporation, and runoff.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of water lost due to leaks, evaporation, and runoff.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sızıntı, buharlaşma ve akış nedeniyle kaybedilen su yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Wasserverlusts durch Lecks, Verdunstung und Abfluss.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'eau perdue dû aux fuites, évaporation et ruissellement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de agua perdida por fugas, evaporación y escorrentía.

inputs.label: Annual labor hours for irrigation
inputs.businessContext: Total labor hours dedicated to irrigation operation and maintenance.

label_i18n.fr: Heures de main-d'œuvre annuelles pour l'irrigation
label_i18n.es: Horas de trabajo anuales para riego

businessContext_i18n.en: Total labor hours dedicated to irrigation operation and maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sulama işletme ve bakımına ayrılan toplam işçilik saati.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'heures de main-d'œuvre consacrées à l'exploitation et à l'entretien de l'irrigation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de horas de trabajo dedicadas a la operación y mantenimiento del riego.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Yan haklar dahil ortalama saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire moyen incluant les avantages sociaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario promedio por hora incluyendo beneficios.

inputs.label: Annual maintenance cost
inputs.businessContext: Total annual cost for repairs, parts, and servicing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual cost for repairs, parts, and servicing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Onarım, yedek parça ve servis için yıllık toplam maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte jährliche Kosten für Reparaturen, Ersatzteile und Wartung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel total pour les réparations, pièces et services.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste total anual por reparaciones, piezas y servicio.

rules.message: Pump efficiency must be between 10% and 100%.
Distribution losses must be between 0% and 50%.
Water volume must be greater than zero.
Irrigated area must be greater than zero.
Drip systems are strongly recommended to have automation for optimal efficiency.

thresholds.message: Water cost exceeds $1.00/m³ – consider water conservation measures.
Pump efficiency below 60% – immediate maintenance or replacement recommended.
Distribution losses above 20% – investigate leaks and improve system.
Labor hours exceed 1000/year – consider automation to reduce costs.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
